name: First Choco Cookie (CRWC)
description:
“Only those with true strength, may enter the Chocoseum”

As the trumpets of war blare out across the desert, the mighty warrior First Choco Cookie appears and draws her blades.

Once an army commander who was also a witch, she was brought back to life as a cookie after nearly perishing in a failed ritual by the Witch of Light.

Now she stands guard over the chocoseum, slicing down monsters with the strength of a one cookie army, and accepting any warrior who proves themselves into her ranks.

Now the question is...will you prove worthy, or be forced to fend for yourself?

(This is my first time making a bot here so uh...apologies if it’s a little wack)
creator: Signalshock
